title: stephanostachys tepejilote
intro: Stephanostachys tepejilote, also known as the Mexican tea tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stephanostachys tepejilote include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used to make a decoction, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized for therapeutic purposes.
